# Document Edit Pro AI

> All-in-one productivity platform with 100+ free tools for PDFs, AI document analysis, file conversion, image editing, document generation, and developer utilities.

Document Edit Pro AI helps individuals, students, professionals, and businesses manage documents smarter. Edit, convert, organize, summarize, sign, and collaborate from one modern workspace. Most processing runs client-side in the browser for privacy.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the platform and featured tools.
- [Pricing & Premium](/premium): Free vs Premium feature comparison.
- [Blog](/blog): Tutorials and guides on PDF, AI, and productivity tools.
- [FAQ](/faq): Common questions about tools, privacy, and limits.
- [About](/about): Mission and platform overview.
- [Contact](/contact): Support, partnerships, and enterprise inquiries.

## Tool Categories

- [Organize PDFs](/category/organize): Merge, split, rotate, reorder, extract and remove pages.
- [Convert](/category/convert): PDF ↔ Word, Excel, PowerPoint, JPG, PNG, HTML, TXT.
- [Edit](/category/edit): Edit text, add watermarks, page numbers, signatures.
- [AI Tools](/category/ai): PDF chat, summarizer, translator, resume analyzer, content writer.
- [Image Tools](/category/image): Compress, resize, crop, convert, background removal.
- [Security](/category/security): Protect, unlock, redact, sign PDFs.
- [Documents](/category/documents): Invoice, NDA, offer letter, certificate generators.

## Popular Tools

- [Merge PDF](/merge): Combine multiple PDFs into one.
- [Split PDF](/split): Split a PDF into separate files by range or page.
- [Compress PDF](/compress): AI-powered PDF compression with quality control.
- [PDF to Word](/pdf-to-word): Convert PDFs to editable Word documents.
- [Word to PDF](/word-to-pdf): Convert DOCX files to PDF.
- [PDF to JPG](/pdf-to-jpg): Export PDF pages as JPG images.
- [JPG to PDF](/jpg-to-pdf): Combine images into a single PDF.
- [Protect PDF](/protect): Add passwords and permissions.
- [Unlock PDF](/unlock): Remove password protection from PDFs you own.
- [AI PDF Chat](/tools/aichat): Ask questions about your PDF documents.
- [AI Summarizer](/tools/aisummarize): Generate concise summaries of long documents.

## Optional

- [Refer & Earn](/refer): Referral program details.
- [Donate](/donate): Support the project.
